hostel_overview.availability: Separate hostels available for male and female B.E. students within the DSCE campus area.
hostel_overview.room_type: Well-furnished and spacious rooms with basic amenities for comfortable student living.
hostel_overview.food: Balanced and nutritious vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals are served in the hostel mess.

general_rules: Right of admission to hostel is reserved by the management.
Hostel fees must be paid for the full academic year before admission.
Caution deposit is refunded at the end of the academic year after deductions if any.
NRI and foreign students must pay hostel fees in USD.
Students cannot change rooms without written permission from the warden.
Guests are not permitted without written permission.
Attendance is taken daily in the hostel.
Ragging is strictly prohibited inside hostel premises.
Use of drugs, alcohol and smoking is strictly prohibited.
Pornographic material is not allowed inside the hostel.
Loud music and gambling are not permitted.
Students must return to the hostel before the stipulated time.
The warden has the authority to ask any inmate to vacate the hostel if rules are violated.
mess_rules: Mess charges must be paid before the due date.
Mess operates on a dividing system for food expenses.
Outside food is not allowed in the dining hall.
Food will be served only during scheduled mess timings.
Self-service may be introduced in emergency situations.
Students are expected to avoid wasting food.
discipline_rules: Maintain silence in corridors and common areas.
Furniture and hostel property must be handled carefully.
Birthday parties and celebrations are not allowed inside the hostel.
Vehicle parking is not permitted inside hostel premises.
Rooms must be locked when leaving.
Students should not disturb other residents.
Hostel management is not responsible for loss of valuables.
